full_text:
Cao Zheng 曹整
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Zheng (曹整). Adopted into the Cao Shao line but died without issue. Cao Zheng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Zheng lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
